story.iWant: Axon Framework configured with Command and Query Gateways
story.soThat: I can dispatch commands and execute queries through Axon infrastructure

tasks.task: Add Axon Framework 4.12.1 to version catalog
Create AxonConfiguration.kt with CommandGateway and QueryGateway beans
Write unit tests for gateway injection
Commit: "Add Axon Framework core configuration with gateways"

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: framework/cqrs module created with Axon Framework 4.12.1 dependency
AxonConfiguration.kt configures CommandGateway and QueryGateway beans
CommandBus, EventBus, and QueryBus configured with default settings
Axon auto-configuration enabled in Spring Boot
Unit tests verify gateways are injectable and functional

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.section: FR003: Event Store with Integrity and Performance
doc.snippet: The system shall provide PostgreSQL-based event store with partitioning, BRIN indexes, snapshots, jOOQ projections, automatic data integrity validation, performance monitoring with forecasting and early warnings, and hot migration capabilities for zero-downtime migration to alternative stores.

doc.title: Decision Architecture
doc.snippet: Axon Framework 4.12.1 (production stable, maintained until v5 migration Q3-Q4 2026). Command/Event/Query separation with dedicated buses. Event Store as source of truth (PostgreSQL-based). Projections for optimized read models (jOOQ).

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: CommandGateway and QueryGateway configuration. CommandBus, EventBus, QueryBus setup. Axon auto-configuration with Spring Boot. Framework/cqrs module with core CQRS infrastructure.

doc.title: Coding Standards
doc.snippet: NO wildcard imports - Every import must be explicit. NO generic exceptions - Always use specific exception types (except infrastructure interceptors). Kotest ONLY - JUnit is explicitly forbidden. Version Catalog REQUIRED - All versions in gradle/libs.versions.toml.

doc.title: Test Strategy
doc.snippet: Test-First Development: All production code must be preceded by failing tests (Red-Green-Refactor cycle). Integration-First Approach: Integration tests for critical business flows. Nullable Pattern: Fast infrastructure substitutes for business logic. Real Dependencies: Testcontainers for stateful services.

module.name: framework/cqrs
module.purpose: Axon Framework CQRS infrastructure - CommandGateway, QueryGateway, Bus configuration

file.purpose: Base class for all domain events (from Epic 1.7)
file.snippet: abstract class DomainEvent(open val eventId: UUID, open val occurredAt: Instant)

dependency.name: kotest-runner-junit5-jvm
dependency.usage: Primary testing framework for unit tests

dependency.name: axon-test
dependency.usage: Axon Test Fixtures for aggregate testing

dependency.name: spring-boot-starter-test
dependency.usage: Spring Boot test infrastructure (granular dependencies, no JUnit)

constraints.constraint: NO wildcard imports - Every import must be explicit
NO generic exceptions - Always use specific exception types
Use Kotest ONLY - JUnit is explicitly forbidden
Version Catalog REQUIRED - All dependency versions in gradle/libs.versions.toml
Constitutional TDD - Write tests FIRST (Red-Green-Refactor cycle)
Test execution must be <10 seconds for unit tests
Use @Autowired field injection + init block for @SpringBootTest (NOT constructor injection)
Plugin order: id("eaf.testing") BEFORE id("eaf.spring-boot") in product modules
Document all public APIs with KDoc

interface.name: CommandGateway
interface.signature: interface CommandGateway { fun <R> sendAndWait(command: Any): R }
interface.purpose: Dispatches commands to Axon CommandBus and waits for result
interface.usage: Inject into controllers/services to send commands

interface.name: QueryGateway
interface.signature: interface QueryGateway { fun <R> query(query: Any, responseType: ResponseType<R>): CompletableFuture<R> }
interface.purpose: Dispatches queries to Axon QueryBus and returns result asynchronously
interface.usage: Inject into controllers/services to execute queries

pattern.name: Axon Configuration Bean Pattern

ideas.idea: Verify framework/cqrs module structure exists with correct dependencies in build.gradle.kts
Test that AxonConfiguration creates CommandGateway bean successfully
Test that AxonConfiguration creates QueryGateway bean successfully
Test that CommandBus bean is available from Axon auto-configuration
Test that EventBus bean is available from Axon auto-configuration
Test that QueryBus bean is available from Axon auto-configuration
Test Axon auto-configuration is enabled with @SpringBootTest
Test CommandGateway injection into test class succeeds
Test QueryGateway injection into test class succeeds
Measure test suite execution time and assert <10 seconds
Verify framework/cqrs/README.md exists and documents gateway usage
